g.text: ║ k8s4claw — AI Agent Runtime on Kubernetes ║
║ Demo: OpenClaw runtime in mock mode ║
▸ Step 1: Build the OpenClaw runtime image
docker build -t k8s4claw-openclaw:dev -f runtimes/openclaw/Dockerfile runtimes/openclaw/ 2>&1 | ta
▸ Step 2: Start runtime in mock mode (no API key needed)
▸ Step 4: Send messages via WebSocket (IPC bus protocol)
Hello! I'm an OpenClaw agent running on Kubernetes, managed by k8s4claw. How can I help y
k8s4claw manages AI agent runtimes on Kubernetes. It handles:
- Auto-updates with health checks and circuit breaker
